catalog_issue.definition: manual exists but metadata/model mapping is wrong or incomplete

source_coverage_gap.definition: no source/manual evidence exists for requested model/question

retrieval_issue.definition: evidence exists but retrieval did not surface it

wording_ux_issue.definition: response is technically safe but unclear for staff

prioritized_queue.item: Resolve any source_coverage_gap affecting active dealer workflows
prioritized_queue.trigger: missing manual or missing part references in daily usage

prioritized_queue.item: Fix retrieval_issue for repeated zero-candidate or wrong-section returns
Fix citation_issue for any mismatch between selected and cited manual
Address wording_ux_issue from staff confusion hotspots
